task_completion.description: Verify the 4StoreyBuilding project is opened in eQUEST
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open with the '4StoreyBuilding' project loaded, visible in the title bar or project navigator.

task_completion.description: Verify the building azimuth is changed to 90 degrees
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or building footprint screen showing the building 'Azimuth' parameter set to 90 degrees (East).

task_completion.description: Verify the cooling supply temperature is set to 58°F for all 5 ground floor systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Air-Side Systems properties window (specifically the Cooling tab or Minimum Supply Temp field) showing a value of 58°F for the systems starting with 'G.' (G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15).

task_completion.description: Verify the annual simulation is executed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation progress window (DOE-2 calculation) is visible, showing the simulation running or a 'Simulation Complete' dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved after modifications
task_completion.visual_evidence: The File menu is open with 'Save' selected, a save confirmation dialog is visible, or the save icon is clicked in the toolbar.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the eQUEST GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with eQUEST's graphical interface (dialog boxes, system trees, property sheets) rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the .inp file was not modified via text editors or terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows using 'sed', 'awk', or text editors (like Notepad, VS Code) open with the 4StoreyBuilding.inp file.

integrity.description: Ensure the simulation was genuinely run within the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation dialog must be the authentic eQUEST/DOE-2 calculation window, not a mocked output or skipped step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL: The task description mentions 'COOL-SET-T', but this parameter does not exist in eQUEST. The actual parameter in the eQUEST UI and INP file is 'Minimum Supply Temp' (MIN-SUPPLY-T). The target value is 58°F. The building has exactly 5 ground-floor systems that need this change: G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15. The building azimuth should be changed from 360 (or 0) to 90 degrees.
